name: FirstClass Failed Password Change Attempt
description: Detects failed attempts to change a user's password in FirstClass. This can indicate attacker activity or legitimate user errors.

prompts.prompt: A failed password change attempt was detected in the FirstClass system. This could indicate an attacker trying to manipulate accounts or a legitimate user error. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **User Name** {user_name}, **Source IP** {source_ip}, **Application** {application}, **Reason** {reason}. Investigate this activity to determine if it's a legitimate user issue or a malicious attempt to compromise an account.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the failed password change attempt.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The username for which the password change was attempted.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The IP address from which the password change attempt originated.

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: The application or interface used for the password change attempt (e.g., 'FirstClass client', 'web').

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The reason provided for the password change failure, if available.
